subject: FW:
body:
From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, December 04, 2007 2:38 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Lesley Groff
Subject: 
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Mr. Epstein, 

 

I spoke with Darren today in your office and he tells me that George
Reenstra is presenting another offer to you directly.  I need to know if
I am the only authorized agent for the S76C++ and the Boeing 727-100 or
not.  We have never needed a signed agreement in the past and if George
is your choice I need to know so that I don't get into trouble here at
Bristol.  Again I have had several parties call me to question the
exclusive on the helicopter and George continues to represent it in the
market.  

 

Simply if you would prefer George represent you in the sale I fully
understand but I need to know.  

 

Best regards 

 

  

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

1-540-665-5135 direct

1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

1-540-533-8183 Mobile

1-540-301-0050 FAX

slancaster@bristolassociates.com

www.bristolassociates.com
body_html:
From: Sean J. Lancaster [mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com]
Sent: Tuesday, December 04, 2007 2:38 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Lesley Groff
Subject:
Sensitivity: Confidential

 

Mr. Epstein,

 

I spoke with Darren today in your office and he tells me that George Reenstra is presenting another offer to you directly.  I need to know if I am the only authorized agent for the S76C++ and the Boeing 727-100 or not.  We have never needed a signed agreement in the past and if George is your choice I need to know so that I don’t get into trouble here at Bristol.  Again I have had several parties call me to question the exclusive on the helicopter and George continues to represent it in the market. 

 

Simply if you would prefer George represent you in the sale I fully understand but I need to know. 

 

Best regards

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

1-540-665-5135 direct
